symptoms: MySQL: 'Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction'
POST /payments error rate: 0.1% → 23% within 6 minutes of deploy
Retry storms from iOS/Android clients amplifying deadlock contention
Slow query log: SELECT FOR UPDATE on idempotency_keys holding locks >8 s
hypotheses_tested: Multiple transactions are locking each other
Classic AB/BA deadlock due to idempotency_keys and payment_transactions locks
Lock held for the duration of the Stripe API call
failed_attempts: Adding innodb_lock_wait_timeout=2 — failed to resolve, only failed faster
confirmed_root_cause: The idempotency lock (SELECT FOR UPDATE on idempotency_keys) is held while waiting for Stripe's response, which takes 2–8 s, creating a classic AB/BA deadlock with mobile client retries
resolution_action: Replaced SELECT FOR UPDATE with INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE (optimistic lock), moved Stripe API call outside the transaction boundary, added innodb_lock_wait_timeout=2, and added client-side retry jitter (100–500 ms random backoff) in mobile SDK
